tools.name: complexity_meter
tools.description: Analyze GraphQL query complexity. Returns depth, field count, list multipliers, and a risk level (LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH/CRITICAL). CRITICAL means the query should be rejected.

tools.name: rate_limiter
tools.description: Check and enforce rate limiting for a client. In-memory sliding window — state resets on cold start.

tools.name: query_rewriter
tools.description: Text-level rewrite of an overly complex GraphQL query: strips excess nesting depth and truncates too many fields.
